title: Re-run Real Benchmark (5 FIGS x 8 Datasets x 5-fold CV) with Output Size Fix
summary: Demo notebook demonstrating 5 FIGS (Fast Interpretable Greedy-tree Sums) split strategies with Co-Information (CoI) guided feature clustering on a synthetic adult dataset (60 examples, 6 features, 3-fold CV). Computes CoI matrix, applies 3 clustering methods (unsigned spectral, signed SPONGE, hard threshold), trains FIGS trees with all 5 strategies (axis-aligned, random-oblique, unsigned-spectral, signed-spectral, hard-threshold) across 3 max_splits values (5, 10, 20), and visualizes balanced accuracy comparison. Uses full original parameter values. Runs in ~10 seconds.
